title: AS/NZS 4600:2018 Cold-Formed Steel Member Design
description: Design cold-formed steel members in accordance with AS/NZS 4600.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer. Symbol: Product. Select Australian Cold-Formed Steel manufacturer.

shape.description: Shape. Symbol: Shape. Select available manufacturer shapes.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select from library to edit Section Dimensions.

d_input.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Total height of section.

b_input.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Total width of section.

b2_input.description: b2. Symbol: b_2. Units: mm. Bottom width of section.

r_input.description: r. Symbol: r. Units: mm. Fillet radius.

t_input.description: t. Symbol: t. Units: mm. Thickness of section.

tl_input.description: tl. Symbol: t_l. Units: mm. Width of lip.

la_input.description: la. Symbol: l_a. Units: mm. Lip angle.

ha_input.description: ha. Symbol: h_a. Units: °. Hat Angle.

standard.description: Standard. Symbol: Standard. Select Custom to edit Material Properties.

steel_grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. Select Custom to edit Material Properties.

F_y_flange_input.description: fy. Symbol: f_y. Units: MPa. Section Yield Strength.

F_u_flange_input.description: fu. Symbol: f_u. Units: MPa. Section Tensile Strength.

E_input.description: E. Symbol: E. Units: MPa. Elastic Modulus.

G_input.description: G. Symbol: G. Units: MPa. Shear Modulus.

global_buckling.description: Global Buckling. Flexural Torsional Buckling checks will be skipped when set to Fully Braced.  (i.e. Mbe = My & Nce = Ny)

L_ex_flexure_input.description: Lez. Symbol: L_{ez}. Units: mm. Effective length for buckling about Z-Axis.

L_ey_flexure_input.description: Ley. Symbol: L_{ey}. Units: mm. Effective length for buckling about Y-Axis.

L_ez_flexure_twist_input.description: Lex.twist. Symbol: L_{ex.twist}. Units: mm. Effective length for twisting about X-Axis.

kt_input.description: kt. Symbol: k_{t}. Correction factor for distribution of forces determined in accordance with Clause 3.2.3.2.

Mz.description: M*z. Symbol: M*_{z}. Units: kNm. Major (Z) Axis Factored Moment. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

My.description: M*y. Symbol: M*_{y}. Units: kNm. Minor (Y) Axis Factored Moment. Positive value results in compression at right of section.

Vy.description: V*y. Symbol: V*_{y}. Units: kN. Major (Y) Axis Factored Shear.

Vz.description: V*z. Symbol: V*_{z}. Units: kN. Minor (Z) Axis Factored Shear.

N.description: N*. Symbol: N^*. Units: kN. Compressive (+) or Tensile (-) Axial Force.

load_axes.description: Load Axes. Select which axis system design loads are applied. Loads applied in Geometric Axes will be rotated to Principal Axes for Capacity Checks.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
